title: cleanup 배선 (driver step + irreversible-git 승인 게이트)
goal: wire cleanup as a driver-owned deterministic step that tears down per-run git worktrees behind an explicit irreversible-git approval gate

acceptance_criteria.statement: nextNode on a ready driver-owned (cleanup) node returns action equals cleanup and dispatches the node to running, with no spawn.
runCleanup without approval and with worktrees present returns status blocked and leaves the worktrees intact; with --approve it removes them and returns status passed.
cleanupApprovalGate returns allowed false for a not_required gate and allowed true for an approved gate or an explicit approve.
